name: Julekha Khatun
title: Digital Marketer & Project Coordinator
tagline: Digital Marketer | Social Media Strategist | Project Coordinator
bio: I'm a Digital Marketer and Project Coordinator with 2+ years of experience creating SEO-optimized content, running and scaling ad campaigns, and shaping market strategy. I've managed pages with a 30K+ combined audience and produced 1500+ social posts across lifestyle, gifting, and religious niches, increasing engagement by 30%+ through data-driven content, persuasive copy, and strategic posting.
